message:
Command `
# Check the tee process and its pipe
ORPID=956540
echo "=== Pipe from openroad ==="
# Find the tee process connected to the same pipe
ls -la /proc/*/fd 2>/dev/null | grep "3207830" | grep -v "$ORPID" | head -10

echo ""
echo "=== What is on the pipe? ==="
# Check librelane process pipes
LIBREPID=$(ps aux | grep librelane | grep python | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
echo "LibreLane PID: $LIBREPID"
ls -la /proc/$LIBREPID/fd 2>/dev/null | head -20
` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:
{"command": "
# Check the tee process and its pipe
ORPID=956540
echo "=== Pipe from openroad ==="
# Find the tee process connected to the same pipe
ls -la /proc/*/fd 2>/dev/null | grep "3207830" | grep -v "$ORPID" | head -10

echo ""
echo "=== What is on the pipe? ==="
# Check librelane process pipes
LIBREPID=$(ps aux | grep librelane | grep python | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
echo "LibreLane PID: $LIBREPID"
ls -la /proc/$LIBREPID/fd 2>/dev/null | head -20
", "timeout": 10}
function.name: execute_bash

=== Pipe from openroad ===

=== What is on the pipe? ===
LibreLane PID: 956480
total 0

l-wx------ 1 user user 64 May 30 01:13 1 -> /dev/null
lr-x------ 1 user user 64 May 30 01:13 11 -> pipe:[3207830]
l-wx------ 1 user user 64 May 30 01:15 12 -> /dev/null
l-wx------ 1 user user 64 May 30 01:13 2 -> pipe:[3207819]
lr-x------ 1 user user 64 May 30 01:13 4 -> /sys/fs/cgroup/user
lr-x------ 1 user user 64 May 30 01:13 7 -> /sys/fs/cgroup/ptys
lr-x------ 1 user user 64 May 30 01:13 8 -> /sys/fs/cgroup/socats

extras.command:
# Check the tee process and its pipe
ORPID=956540
echo "=== Pipe from openroad ==="
# Find the tee process connected to the same pipe
ls -la /proc/*/fd 2>/dev/null | grep "3207830" | grep -v "$ORPID" | head -10

echo ""
echo "=== What is on the pipe? ==="
# Check librelane process pipes
LIBREPID=$(ps aux | grep librelane | grep python | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
echo "LibreLane PID: $LIBREPID"
ls -la /proc/$LIBREPID/fd 2>/dev/null | head -20
